_comment: Official Datadog managed MCP server (remote, OAuth). Read-only is enforced by roles/IAM, NOT a config flag — authenticate a principal with the Datadog Read-Only Role (see SETUP.md). This is a preview ('unstable') API path and may change. Choose your regional endpoint. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
